name: Zscaler + CrowdStrike
description: Zscaler Internet Access as the SWG/CASB layer, CrowdStrike Falcon on the endpoint. A common stack in large enterprises with a Zscaler-first network security architecture. Relies on generic network rules through the Zscaler proxy and CrowdStrike endpoint telemetry for AI detection.
compensating_controls: Use Zscaler's AI/ML application category and URL filtering policies to block or monitor consumer AI services at the proxy layer.
Use CrowdStrike Falcon Insight (DET-CS-FALCON-001) for endpoint-level detection of AI tool process execution and network connections.
Use CrowdStrike Falcon Data Protection (DET-CS-FALCON-002) for endpoint DLP equivalent to Purview Endpoint DLP.
Zscaler Nanolog Streaming Service (NSS) can export logs to your SIEM for correlation with CrowdStrike events.
Identity-side: pair with your identity provider's conditional-access policies (Okta, Entra ID) for unmanaged-device blocking.

things_to_know.title: Zscaler AI/ML app category
things_to_know.content: Zscaler's URL database includes an AI/ML application category. Enable it in your URL filtering policy for immediate visibility into AI service access across all proxied traffic.

things_to_know.title: SSL inspection required
things_to_know.content: AI services use TLS. Without SSL inspection enabled in Zscaler, you lose visibility into API-level activity and can only see domain-level connections. Plan SSL inspection rollout before enforcement.

things_to_know.title: Correlate to a central SIEM
things_to_know.content: Without Sentinel, route Zscaler NSS logs and CrowdStrike events to your central SIEM (Splunk, Chronicle, Elastic, Panther) for cross-source correlation against runbook triggers.

things_to_know.title: Generic network rules are your baseline
things_to_know.content: DET-NET-001 and DET-NET-002 work through any proxy/firewall, including Zscaler. Deploy these first while building Zscaler-native policies.

policy_token_replacements.siem_tool: your central SIEM (Splunk / Chronicle / Elastic / Panther)
policy_token_replacements.dlp_tool: CrowdStrike Falcon Data Protection (plus Zscaler inline DLP)
